§ 01 · Energy Availability

The permissive factor — no surplus, no growth

Intake vs TDEE Daily · Lose It! intake vs RMR + Active + TEF

Daily surplus / deficit bars = daily kcal · rolling avg lines · right axis = 7d weight (lbs)

Daily protein target = 1.2 g / lb body weight (moves with weight)

§ 02 · Training Stimulus

Hard sets per muscle per week is the mechanism

Total sets per week all working sets (drop/warmup excluded) · last 26 weeks

Hard sets per week reps < 15 · slide to change threshold

<8 <10 <12 <15 <18 <20 <25

Muscle group × week heatmap 12 weeks · 9 muscle groups (Chest, Back, Biceps, Triceps, Shoulders, Abs, Quads, Hamstrings, Calves) · toggle total vs hard sets (reps < 8 … < 20)

<8 <10 <12 <15 <18 <20
0 sets low mid high

Progressive overload — per muscle group 1RM trendline color by slope · summary %, then per-exercise detail

ℹ️ Only exercises with at least 10 sets in the last 4 weeks qualify. The 1RM trend is a linear fit of weekly peak e1RM over the last 12 weeks. Toggle the threshold to see more or fewer exercises.
